bind-pdf-form-to-autofiller.title: Bind PDF Form to AutoFiller and List Form Fields
bind-pdf-form-to-autofiller.description: Shows how to bind a PDF form to an Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller instance and enumerate the form fields using the Form facade.

create-datatable-from-xlsx.title: Create DataTable from XLSX for PDF Form Filling
create-datatable-from-xlsx.description: Reads the first worksheet of an XLSX file, uses the first row as column headers to build a DataTable, and demonstrates passing the table to Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller for PDF form population.

import-datatable-into-pdf-form.title: Import DataTable into PDF Form with Column Settings
import-datatable-into-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates setting DataColumn properties such as ReadOnly and Unique before importing the DataTable into a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

import-datatable-autofiller.title: Import DataTable into AutoFiller to Fill PDF Form
import-datatable-autofiller.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a form field, populating a DataTable, and using AutoFiller to merge the data into the PDF.

save-filled-pdf-preserve-layout.title: Save Filled PDF While Preserving Original Layout
save-filled-pdf-preserve-layout.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF, optionally fill its form fields, and save the document using the Form facade so that the original layout remains unchanged.

generate-pdf-per-row.title: Generate Separate PDF Page per DataTable Row and Verify
generate-pdf-per-row.description: Creates a template PDF, fills it with data from a DataTable using AutoFiller to produce one PDF per row, then checks that each generated PDF contains exactly one page.

rename-datatable-columns.title: Rename DataTable Columns to Match PDF Form Fields
rename-datatable-columns.description: Demonstrates how to rename DataTable columns to match PDF form field names before using AutoFiller to fill the PDF.

fill-pdf-form-autofiller.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller with DataColumnCollection
fill-pdf-form-autofiller.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with form fields, adding matching columns to a DataTable, and filling the form using AutoFiller.

fill-pdf-from-multiple-csv-worksheets.title: Fill PDF Form from Multiple CSV Worksheets
fill-pdf-from-multiple-csv-worksheets.description: The example reads each CSV file in a folder as a separate worksheet, loads the data into a DataTable, and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate a PDF form template, producing one filled PDF per worksheet.

fill-pdf-form-with-datatable-exception-h.title: Fill PDF Form with DataTable and Exception Handling
fill-pdf-form-with-datatable-exception-h.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import data from a DataTable, save the filled document, and handle missing file or PDF errors.

fill-pdf-with-autofiller.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller and Dispose Resources
fill-pdf-with-autofiller.description: Creates a PDF with a form field, fills it using AutoFiller, saves the result, and disposes the AutoFiller to release unmanaged resources.

batch-fill-pdf-template.title: Batch Fill PDF Template with Multiple DataTables
batch-fill-pdf-template.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to fill a PDF form repeatedly for each DataTable in a list, producing separate filled PDF files.

fill-pdf-form-memory.title: Fill PDF Form from Memory Stream using AutoFiller
fill-pdf-form-memory.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a memory stream, filling its form fields with data via AutoFiller, and saving the result without creating intermediate files.

export-filter-import-pdf.title: Export XLSX Worksheet to DataTable, Filter Rows, and Import into PDF Table
export-filter-import-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a DataTable (simulating an exported Excel worksheet), filtering its rows, and importing the subset into a PDF table.

generate-pdfs-custom-filenames.title: Generate PDFs with Custom File Names from DataTable
generate-pdfs-custom-filenames.description: Creates a template PDF, fills a form field from a DataTable, and saves each document using a custom file name derived from a column value.

validate-required-form-fields.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Before Importing DataTable
validate-required-form-fields.description: Shows how to check that every required form field in a PDF has a matching column in a DataTable before using AutoFiller to import the data.

generate-pdf-page-summary-report.title: Generate PDF Page Summary Report with DataTable Row IDs
generate-pdf-page-summary-report.description: Loads a PDF, extracts the first cell of the first table on each page as an identifier, optionally matches it against a DataTable, and writes a text report mapping page numbers to row identifiers.

fill-pdf-form-from-csv-mapping.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from CSV Using a JSON Mapping
fill-pdf-form-from-csv-mapping.description: Shows how to read a CSV (Excel export), load a JSON column‑to‑PDF‑field mapping, and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to fill and save a PDF for each data row.

stream-csv-to-pdf-auto-filler.title: Stream CSV Data into PDF Form with AutoFiller
stream-csv-to-pdf-auto-filler.description: Demonstrates loading a large CSV file row‑by‑row into a DataTable and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import the data, and generate a merged PDF without exhausting memory.

validate-pdf-size-after-filling.title: Validate PDF Size After Filling Form with AutoFiller
validate-pdf-size-after-filling.description: Creates a sample PDF with a form field, fills it using AutoFiller from a DataTable, saves the result, and checks that the file size does not exceed a predefined limit.

fill-pdf-from-excel.title: Fill PDF Form from Uploaded Excel using AutoFiller
fill-pdf-from-excel.description: Demonstrates an ASP.NET Core controller that receives an XLSX file, creates a sample PDF template, fills it using Aspose.Pdf.AutoFiller, and returns the filled PDF.

fill-pdf-form-with-timeout-cancellation.title: Fill PDF Form with Timeout Cancellation
fill-pdf-form-with-timeout-cancellation.description: Demonstrates how to fill a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf and abort the operation if it exceeds a specified timeout by employing a CancellationToken with asynchronous saving.

convert-pdf-to-excel-with-temp-folder.title: Convert PDF to Excel Using Temporary Folder and Disk Buffer
convert-pdf-to-excel-with-temp-folder.description: Demonstrates converting a large PDF to an Excel file while using a dedicated temporary folder and disk buffering to manage intermediate files and prevent memory or disk‑space issues.

populate-formatted-numeric-values.title: Populate PDF Form Fields with Formatted Numeric Values
populate-formatted-numeric-values.description: Creates a PDF with a text field, formats numeric values in a DataTable, and fills the field using AutoFiller.

fill-pdf-form-from-datatable-with-loggin.title: Fill PDF Form from DataTable with Row Logging
fill-pdf-form-from-datatable-with-loggin.description: Demonstrates iterating over a DataTable, filling a PDF form template using Aspose.Pdf, saving each row as a single‑page PDF, logging the processed rows and page numbers, and merging the generated pages into a final document.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-owner-passwords.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords
encrypt-pdf-with-user-owner-passwords.description: Shows how to protect an existing filled PDF by applying user and owner passwords, setting privileges, and saving the encrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

merge-filled-pdfs.title: Merge Multiple Filled PDFs into a Single Document
merge-filled-pdfs.description: Creates a template PDF with a form field, fills it with data from separate DataTables to generate individual PDFs, and merges them into one consolidated PDF.

convert-filled-pdf-to-byte-array.title: Convert Filled PDF to Byte Array Using PdfViewer
convert-filled-pdf-to-byte-array.description: Demonstrates loading a filled PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer and returning its content as a byte array without writing the file to disk.

async-fill-pdf-from-csv.title: Asynchronously Fill PDF Form from CSV Data
async-fill-pdf-from-csv.description: Demonstrates how to read CSV data asynchronously, populate an Aspose.Pdf form using the Form facade, and save the filled PDF with non‑blocking I/O.

validate-filled-pdf-fields-against-datat.title: Validate Filled PDF Fields Against DataTable
validate-filled-pdf-fields-against-datat.description: Demonstrates filling a PDF form from a DataTable using AutoFiller and then asserting that each form field value matches the original data via the Form facade in a unit test.

autofiller-pdf-merge-retry.title: AutoFiller PDF Merge with Retry on Transient I/O Errors
autofiller-pdf-merge-retry.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import a DataTable, and save the merged document while implementing a retry mechanism for transient file‑access exceptions.

split-filled-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.title: Split Filled PDF into Single‑Page PDFs
split-filled-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.description: Shows how to split a filled PDF into separate one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

fill-pdf-acroform-from-csv.title: Fill PDF AcroForm from CSV Data
fill-pdf-acroform-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file, map its columns to PDF AcroForm field names, fill the fields using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, and save the resulting PDF.
